subject: PennyAlpha Pre-Market — 2026-04-28
text:
Pre-Market Summary — 2026-04-28

Candidates screened: 16 | Passed filters: 0

TICKER | PM Move% | Direction | Catalyst | SEC Confirmed
--------------------------------------------------------------
No qualifying candidates.

Screened out (notable):
- SGMT: ~+35% PM — FAIL: price $7–9 (above $5 ceiling); $175M offering at $6/share
- ORKA: ~+33% PM — FAIL: price ~$90+ (above $5 ceiling); Phase 2a psoriasis data
- MANE: ~+19% PM — FAIL: price ~$80–100 (above $5 ceiling); active secondary offering
- CMPX: ~+9% technical bounce ($1.82–2.18 range) — FAIL: catalyst negative (treatment death Apr 27); bounce speculative only
- BBBY +23.9%, ABCL +2.7% — FAIL: above $5 or below 5% threshold

Macro: Tech risk-off (OpenAI missed targets); Oracle -7.5%, Nvidia -2–5%; S&P -0.17%, Nasdaq -0.55%. No PDUFA on Apr 28.

Watchlist: MDAI and BZAI both failed morning RVOL check (cleared). No active watchlist names.
